title: DCP Dependency
description: The canonical representation of a stated relationship between two entities. A Dependency DESCRIBES a relationship; DCP performs, enforces, orders, or schedules nothing on the basis of it. A 'blocks' dependency is a statement that one item is considered a prerequisite for another, not an instruction to a scheduler.

dependency_type.description: Relationship vocabulary: blocks, requires, relates_to, duplicates, supersedes. Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.
